privileged_info_for_vlm: The spreadsheet contains 10 auction items, 18 bidders, and 23 bids. Expected outcomes: Total funds raised is exactly $885. 6 items are SOLD (high bid >= reserve), 2 items are BELOW RESERVE (high bid < reserve), and 2 items have NO BIDS. Therefore, exactly 4 items need attention. Minimum bid increments are: $5 for starting bids $0-$49, $10 for $50-$199, and $25 for $200+.
